---
title: "Software"
---

## mediationverse

A unified R ecosystem for mediation analysis, providing tools for model fitting, effect sizes, confidence intervals, sensitivity analysis, and simulation.

[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-mediationverse-blue?logo=github)](https://github.com/Data-Wise/mediationverse)
[![Docs](https://img.shields.io/badge/Docs-Website-green)](https://data-wise.github.io/mediationverse)

### Installation

```r
# Install the entire ecosystem
pak::pak("data-wise/mediationverse")

# Load all packages
library(mediationverse)
```

### Package Ecosystem

| Package | Description | Status |
|---------|-------------|--------|
| [**mediationverse**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/mediationverse) | Meta-package (loads all) | Development |
| [**medfit**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/medfit) | Model fitting & extraction | CRAN-bound (P1) |
| [**probmed**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/probmed) | P_med effect sizes | Active development (P1) |
| [**RMediation**](https://cran.r-project.org/package=RMediation) | Confidence intervals | [![CRAN](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/RMediation)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=RMediation) |
| [**medrobust**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/medrobust) | Sensitivity analysis | Development |
| [**medsim**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/medsim) | Simulation infrastructure | Development |

### Quick Example

```r
library(mediationverse)

# Fit mediation models
fit_m <- lm(Mediator ~ Treatment + Covariates, data = mydata)
fit_y <- lm(Outcome ~ Treatment + Mediator + Covariates, data = mydata)

# Extract mediation data
med_data <- extract_mediation(fit_m, fit_y, 
                               treatment = "Treatment", 
                               mediator = "Mediator")

# Compute effects
effects <- compute_effects(med_data)
ci <- ci_mediation(med_data, type = "distribution-of-product")
sensitivity <- sensitivity_analysis(med_data)
```

---

## RMediation (CRAN)

Standalone package for computing confidence intervals for mediated effects using the distribution-of-product method.

[![CRAN](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/RMediation)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=RMediation)
[![Downloads](https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/RMediation)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=RMediation)

```r
install.packages("RMediation")
library(RMediation)

# Compute CI for indirect effect
medci(mu.x = 0.5, mu.y = 0.3, 
      se.x = 0.1, se.y = 0.1, 
      type = "dop")
```

---

## Other Tools

A hub-and-spoke toolchain for research and development workflows: [**atlas**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/atlas) is the state hub (projects, sessions, captures); [**flow-cli**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/flow-cli) is the fast shell wrapper around it; the rest are independent spokes.

| Tool | Description | Language |
|------|-------------|----------|
| [**atlas**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/atlas) | State engine hub: projects, sessions, captures, breadcrumbs (`atlas doctor`, `project list --kind`) | Node.js |
| [**flow-cli**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/flow-cli) | Fast (<10ms) ZSH shell wrapper for atlas; ADHD-optimized commands (`work`, `dash`) | ZSH |
| [**craft**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/craft) | Claude Code plugin: commands, skills, and agents for dev workflows | JS/ZSH plugin |
| [**rforge**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/rforge) | Claude Code plugin for R-package ecosystem authoring | R + plugin |
| [**scholar**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/scholar) | Claude plugin for statistical teaching (exams, quizzes, slides, lectures, courses) | Claude plugin |
| [**nexus-cli**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/nexus-cli) | Knowledge-workflow CLI for academic researchers | Python |
| [**aiterm**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/aiterm) | AI terminal optimizer CLI for Claude Code / OpenCode / Gemini CLI | Node.js |
| [**obsidian-cli-ops**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/obsidian-cli-ops) | Obsidian vault automation; renders a deterministic research board from atlas state (`obs research board`) | Python/Node |
| [**himalaya-mcp**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/himalaya-mcp) | MCP server wrapping the himalaya email CLI | TypeScript |
| [**scribe-sw**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/scribe-sw) | Distraction-free writer (macOS-native rewrite of `scribe`) | Swift |
| [**dtslides**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/dtslides) | reveal.js presentation themes | Quarto extension |
| [**homebrew-tap**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/homebrew-tap) | `brew tap data-wise/tap` — distributes the above tools | Ruby |
| [**emacs-r-devkit**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/emacs-r-devkit) | Emacs configuration for R development | Emacs Lisp |
| [**docs-standards**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/docs-standards) | Shared documentation standards | Docs |

Together, atlas + obsidian-cli-ops form a **[Research-Ops Platform](research-ops.qmd)** — `.STATUS` → registry → live Obsidian board.

---

*All software is open source. Contributions welcome!*
